<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=1080">
<title>Lathishri B – Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Orbitron:wght@400;700;900&family=Exo+2:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;0,700;1,300&family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

  body {
    width: 1080px;
    min-height: 1920px;
    background: #07020f;
    font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    position: relative;
  }

  /* ── BACKGROUND CANVAS ── */
  .bg {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    width: 1080px;
    height: 1920px;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 900px 600px at 50% 0%,   #1a0533 0%, transparent 70%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 700px 700px at 100% 30%, #0d1a4a 0%, transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 600px 800px at 0%   70%, #1a0533 0%, transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 800px 500px at 50% 100%,#0d1a4a 0%, transparent 70%),
      linear-gradient(160deg, #07020f 0%, #0c0520 40%, #060d24 70%, #07020f 100%);
    z-index: 0;
  }

  /* Animated grid */
  .grid-bg {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0; width: 1080px; height: 1920px;
    background-image:
      linear-gradient(rgba(120,60,255,0.07) 1px, transparent 1px),
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(120,60,255,0.07) 1px, transparent 1px);
    background-size: 54px 54px;
    z-index: 0;
  }

  /* Glowing orbs */
  .orb {
    position: fixed;
    border-radius: 50%;
    filter: blur(90px);
    opacity: .45;
    z-index: 0;
    animation: pulse 6s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
  }
  .orb1 { width:420px;height:420px;background:#7c3aed;top:-80px;left:-100px; }
  .orb2 { width:350px;height:350px;background:#ec4899;top:500px;right:-80px;animation-delay:2s; }
  .orb3 { width:300px;height:300px;background:#3b82f6;top:1000px;left:-60px;animation-delay:4s; }
  .orb4 { width:380px;height:380px;background:#8b5cf6;bottom:-100px;right:-80px;animation-delay:1s; }

  @keyframes pulse {
    from { transform: scale(1); opacity:.4; }
    to   { transform: scale(1.15); opacity:.55; }
  }

  /* Floating particles */
  .particles { position:fixed;inset:0;width:1080px;height:1920px;z-index:0;pointer-events:none; }
  .p { position:absolute; border-radius:50%; animation:float linear infinite; }
  @keyframes float {
    0%   { transform:translateY(0) rotate(0deg);   opacity:0; }
    10%  { opacity:1; }
    90%  { opacity:.7; }
    100% { transform:translateY(-1900px) rotate(720deg); opacity:0; }
  }

  /* ── LAYOUT ── */
  .poster {
    position: relative; z-index: 1;
    width: 1080px; min-height: 1920px;
    padding: 0;
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
  }

  /* ── TOP HEADER BAND ── */
  .header-band {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 36px 60px 24px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
  }
  .logo-mark {
    font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;
    font-size: 22px; font-weight: 900;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg,#a78bfa,#ec4899);
    -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
  }
  .header-dots {
    display:flex; gap:10px; align-items:center;
  }
  .hdot { width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%; }
  .hdot1{background:#ec4899;} .hdot2{background:#a78bfa;} .hdot3{background:#38bdf8;}

  /* ── HERO SECTION ── */
  .hero {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 10px 60px 0;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    position: relative;
  }

  /* Photo frame */
  .photo-wrapper {
    position: relative;
    width: 320px; height: 380px;
    margin-bottom: 24px;
  }
  .photo-ring {
    position:absolute; inset:-14px;
    border-radius: 50% 50% 50% 50% / 60% 60% 40% 40%;
    background: conic-gradient(from 0deg, #ec4899, #a78bfa, #38bdf8, #ec4899);
    animation: spin 8s linear infinite;
    filter: blur(2px);
  }
  @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
  .photo-ring-inner {
    position:absolute; inset:-8px;
    border-radius: 50% 50% 50% 50% / 60% 60% 40% 40%;
    background: #07020f;
  }
  .photo-img {
    position:relative; z-index:2;
    width: 320px; height: 380px;
    object-fit: cover; object-position: top;
    border-radius: 50% 50% 50% 50% / 60% 60% 40% 40%;
    border: 3px solid rgba(167,139,250,.4);
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(167,139,250,.6)) drop-shadow(0 0 60px rgba(236,72,153,.3));
  }

  /* Floating 3D elements around photo */
  .float-el {
    position:absolute; z-index:3;
    border-radius:12px;
    backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);
    font-size:13px; font-weight:600;
    color:#fff; padding:10px 16px;
    animation:floatBob 3s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
    white-space:nowrap;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
  }
  .fe1 { background:rgba(124,58,237,.35); top:-30px; left:-80px; animation-delay:0s; }
  .fe2 { background:rgba(236,72,153,.35); top:-30px; right:-80px; animation-delay:.8s; }
  .fe3 { background:rgba(56,189,248,.35); bottom:60px; left:-100px; animation-delay:1.6s; }
  .fe4 { background:rgba(167,139,250,.35); bottom:60px; right:-100px; animation-delay:.4s; }
  @keyframes floatBob {
    from { transform: translateY(0px) rotate(-2deg); }
    to   { transform: translateY(-12px) rotate(2deg); }
  }

  /* ── NAME + TAGLINE ── */
  .name {
    font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;
    font-size: 54px; font-weight:900; line-height:1;
    text-align:center;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffffff 0%, #e0d7ff 30%, #f9a8d4 70%, #ffffff 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    letter-spacing:3px;
    margin-bottom:14px;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(167,139,250,.5));
  }
  .tagline {
    font-family:'Exo 2',sans-serif;
    font-size:17px; font-weight:300; font-style:italic;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);
    text-align:center;
    letter-spacing:2px;
    margin-bottom:32px;
  }
  .tagline span {
    color:#a78bfa; font-weight:600; font-style:normal;
  }

  /* Divider */
  .divider {
    width:100%;
    height:1px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #a78bfa, #ec4899, #38bdf8, transparent);
    margin: 8px 0;
    position:relative;
  }
  .divider::after {
    content:'✦';
    position:absolute; left:50%; top:50%;
    transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    background:#0c0520; color:#a78bfa;
    padding:0 12px; font-size:14px;
  }

  /* ── SECTIONS ── */
  .sections {
    width:100%; padding:30px 56px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:36px;
  }

  .section-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.04);
    border: 1px solid rgba(167,139,250,.2);
    border-radius:24px;
    padding: 30px 34px;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.35), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.07);
  }
  .section-card::before {
    content:'';
    position:absolute; top:0; left:0; right:0; height:2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7c3aed, #ec4899, #38bdf8);
    border-radius:24px 24px 0 0;
  }

  .section-label {
    font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;
    font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:4px;
    color:#a78bfa; text-transform:uppercase;
    margin-bottom:6px;
  }
  .section-title {
    font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;
    font-size:26px; font-weight:700;
    color:#fff; margin-bottom:16px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
  }
  .section-title::before {
    content:'';
    display:inline-block; width:4px; height:26px;
    background: linear-gradient(#a78bfa,#ec4899);
    border-radius:2px;
  }

  /* About */
  .about-text {
    font-size:16px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.75); line-height:1.8;
  }
  .about-text strong { color:#e0d7ff; }

  .edu-badge {
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
    background:rgba(124,58,237,.2); border:1px solid rgba(167,139,250,.3);
    border-radius:50px; padding:10px 20px; margin-top:16px; margin-right:10px;
    font-size:14px; color:#e0d7ff;
  }
  .edu-badge .icon { font-size:18px; }

  /* Skills */
  .skills-grid {
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:16px;
  }
  .skill-item {
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
    border-radius:16px; padding:18px 20px;
  }
  .skill-head {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; margin-bottom:12px;
  }
  .skill-icon {
    width:42px;height:42px; border-radius:12px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-size:20px; flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .skill-name {
    font-size:15px; font-weight:600; color:#fff;
  }
  .skill-level { font-size:12px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.4); }
  .bar-bg {
    height:6px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.1); border-radius:6px; overflow:hidden;
  }
  .bar-fill {
    height:100%; border-radius:6px;
  }

  /* Projects */
  .projects-grid {
    display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:16px;
  }
  .project-card {
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.04);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
    border-radius:18px; padding:22px 20px;
    position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    cursor:pointer;
    transition:all .3s;
  }
  .project-card::after {
    content:'';
    position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; height:2px;
  }
  .pc1::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#7c3aed,#ec4899);}
  .pc2::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#38bdf8,#7c3aed);}
  .pc3::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ec4899,#f97316);}
  .pc4::after{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#10b981,#38bdf8);}

  .proj-tag {
    font-size:10px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:3px;
    padding:4px 12px; border-radius:50px; margin-bottom:12px;
    display:inline-block; text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .pt1{background:rgba(124,58,237,.25);color:#a78bfa;border:1px solid rgba(124,58,237,.3);}
  .pt2{background:rgba(56,189,248,.2);color:#38bdf8;border:1px solid rgba(56,189,248,.3);}
  .pt3{background:rgba(236,72,153,.2);color:#f472b6;border:1px solid rgba(236,72,153,.3);}
  .pt4{background:rgba(16,185,129,.2);color:#34d399;border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.3);}

  .proj-title {
    font-size:16px; font-weight:700; color:#fff; margin-bottom:8px;
  }
  .proj-desc {
    font-size:13px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.5); line-height:1.5;
  }
  .proj-arrow {
    position:absolute; top:18px; right:18px;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,.2); font-size:18px;
  }

  /* Contact */
  .contact-grid {
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:14px;
  }
  .contact-item {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.04); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
    border-radius:14px; padding:16px 20px;
  }
  .contact-icon {
    width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:13px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-size:20px; flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .contact-label { font-size:11px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.4); letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase; }
  .contact-value { font-size:15px; color:#e0d7ff; font-weight:500; word-break:break-all; }

  /* ── FOOTER ── */
  .footer {
    padding: 30px 60px 48px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:14px;
    width:100%;
  }
  .footer-line {
    width:100%;height:1px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(167,139,250,.3),rgba(236,72,153,.3),transparent);
  }
  .footer-text {
    font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;
    font-size:11px; letter-spacing:4px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.2);
    text-align:center; text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .footer-social {
    display:flex; gap:18px;
  }
  .fsoc {
    width:44px;height:44px; border-radius:12px;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.06); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-size:18px; cursor:pointer;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- BACKGROUND LAYERS -->
<div class="bg"></div>
<div class="grid-bg"></div>
<div class="orb orb1"></div>
<div class="orb orb2"></div>
<div class="orb orb3"></div>
<div class="orb orb4"></div>

<!-- PARTICLES -->
<div class="particles" id="particles"></div>

<div class="poster">

  <!-- HEADER -->
  <div class="header-band">
    <div class="logo-mark">LB</div>
    <div style="font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);letter-spacing:3px;font-family:'Orbitron',sans-serif;">PORTFOLIO · 2026</div>
    <div class="header-dots">
      <div class="hdot hdot1"></div>
      <div class="hdot hdot2"></div>
      <div class="hdot hdot3"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- HERO -->
  <div class="hero">
    <div class="photo-wrapper">
      <div class="photo-ring"></div>
      <div class="photo-ring-inner"></div>
      <img class="photo-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Lathishri B">
      <!-- Floating chips -->
      <div class="float-el fe1">💡 Innovator</div>
      <div class="float-el fe2">🚀 Creator</div>
      <div class="float-el fe3">⚡ Tech & IT</div>
      <div class="float-el fe4">🌟 Learner</div>
    </div>

    <h1 class="name">LATHISHRI B</h1>
    <p class="tagline">
      <span>Creative Thinker</span> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
      <span>Innovator</span> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
      <span>Lifelong Learner</span>
    </p>

    <div class="divider" style="width:calc(100% - 120px);"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- SECTIONS -->
  <div class="sections">

    <!-- ABOUT ME -->
    <div class="section-card">
      <div class="section-label">01 · Introduction</div>
      <div class="section-title">About Me</div>
      <p class="about-text">
        A passionate and driven individual with a strong foundation in technology and creative thinking.
        Currently channeling curiosity into building impactful digital solutions and growing every day.
      </p>
      <div style="margin-top:16px;">
        <div class="edu-badge"><span class="icon">🏫</span> <span><strong>Schooling</strong> — Kammavar Girls Higher Secondary School</span></div>
        <div class="edu-badge"><span class="icon">🎓</span> <span><strong>B.Tech IT</strong> — National Engineering College, Kovilpatti</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- SKILLS -->
    <div class="section-card">
      <div class="section-label">02 · Expertise</div>
      <div class="section-title">Skills</div>
      <div class="skills-grid">

        <div class="skill-item">
          <div class="skill-head">
            <div class="skill-icon" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(124,58,237,.4),rgba(167,139,250,.2));">🧩</div>
            <div><div class="skill-name">Problem Solving</div><div class="skill-level">Advanced</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="bar-bg"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:88%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#7c3aed,#a78bfa);"></div></div>
        </div>

        <div class="skill-item">
          <div class="skill-head">
            <div class="skill-icon" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(236,72,153,.4),rgba(249,168,212,.2));">💻</div>
            <div><div class="skill-name">Programming</div><div class="skill-level">Intermediate</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="bar-bg"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:75%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#ec4899,#f9a8d4);"></div></div>
        </div>

        <div class="skill-item">
          <div class="skill-head">
            <div class="skill-icon" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(56,189,248,.4),rgba(125,211,252,.2));">🎨</div>
            <div><div class="skill-name">Creative Design</div><div class="skill-level">Growing</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="bar-bg"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:70%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#38bdf8,#7dd3fc);"></div></div>
        </div>

        <div class="skill-item">
          <div class="skill-head">
            <div class="skill-icon" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(16,185,129,.4),rgba(52,211,153,.2));">🤝</div>
            <div><div class="skill-name">Team Work</div><div class="skill-level">Strong</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="bar-bg"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:92%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#10b981,#34d399);"></div></div>
        </div>

        <div class="skill-item">
          <div class="skill-head">
            <div class="skill-icon" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(249,115,22,.4),rgba(251,146,60,.2));">📊</div>
            <div><div class="skill-name">Data Analysis</div><div class="skill-level">Learning</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="bar-bg"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:62%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f97316,#fb923c);"></div></div>
        </div>

        <div class="skill-item">
          <div class="skill-head">
            <div class="skill-icon" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(234,179,8,.4),rgba(253,224,71,.2));">🌐</div>
            <div><div class="skill-name">Web Dev</div><div class="skill-level">Developing</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="bar-bg"><div class="bar-fill" style="width:68%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#eab308,#fde047);"></div></div>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- PROJECTS -->
    <div class="section-card">
      <div class="section-label">03 · Work</div>
      <div class="section-title">Projects</div>
      <div class="projects-grid">
        <div class="project-card pc1">
          <span class="proj-tag pt1">Web App</span>
          <div class="proj-arrow">↗</div>
          <div class="proj-title">Smart Task Manager</div>
          <div class="proj-desc">AI-powered productivity app with intelligent scheduling and real-time collaboration.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-card pc2">
          <span class="proj-tag pt2">Data</span>
          <div class="proj-arrow">↗</div>
          <div class="proj-title">Campus Analytics</div>
          <div class="proj-desc">Dashboard visualizing student performance patterns using Python & data science.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-card pc3">
          <span class="proj-tag pt3">UI/UX</span>
          <div class="proj-arrow">↗</div>
          <div class="proj-title">EduConnect App</div>
          <div class="proj-desc">Mobile-first learning platform connecting students with mentors seamlessly.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="project-card pc4">
          <span class="proj-tag pt4">IoT</span>
          <div class="proj-arrow">↗</div>
          <div class="proj-title">Smart Environment</div>
          <div class="proj-desc">Sensor-based system monitoring campus environment parameters in real time.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CONTACT -->
    <div class="section-card">
      <div class="section-label">04 · Connect</div>
      <div class="section-title">Contact</div>
      <div class="contact-grid">
        <div class="contact-item">
          <div class="contact-icon" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(236,72,153,.3),rgba(124,58,237,.3));">📧</div>
          <div>
            <div class="contact-label">Email</div>
            <div class="contact-value">lathishri227@gmail.com</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-item">
          <div class="contact-icon" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(56,189,248,.3),rgba(124,58,237,.3));">💼</div>
          <div>
            <div class="contact-label">LinkedIn</div>
            <div class="contact-value">linkedin.com/in/lathishri-b-54a78a34a</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-item">
          <div class="contact-icon" style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(16,185,129,.3),rgba(56,189,248,.3));">📍</div>
          <div>
            <div class="contact-label">Location</div>
            <div class="contact-value">Kovilpatti, Tamil Nadu, India</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- FOOTER -->
  <div class="footer">
    <div class="footer-line"></div>
    <div class="footer-social">
      <div class="fsoc">📧</div>
      <div class="fsoc">💼</div>
      <div class="fsoc">🐙</div>
      <div class="fsoc">🐦</div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-text">Lathishri B &nbsp;·&nbsp; B.Tech IT &nbsp;·&nbsp; NEC Kovilpatti &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2026</div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
// Generate particles
const container = document.getElementById('particles');
const colors = ['#a78bfa','#ec4899','#38bdf8','#f9a8d4','#ffffff'];
for(let i=0;i<60;i++){
  const p = document.createElement('div');
  p.classList.add('p');
  const size = Math.random()*4+2;
  p.style.cssText = `
    width:${size}px;height:${size}px;
    background:${colors[Math.floor(Math.random()*colors.length)]};
    left:${Math.random()*1080}px;
    bottom:-20px;
    opacity:${Math.random()*.6+.2};
    animation-duration:${Math.random()*15+10}s;
    animation-delay:${Math.random()*15}s;
    filter:blur(${Math.random()>0.7?'1px':'0px'});
  `;
  container.appendChild(p);
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
